case_title: KANEVSKY, LAURIE VS BENNY'S MOVING & STORAGE CO. INC.

docket_entries.description: FAXED CORRESPONDENCE FROM ATTY ARONSON FIEL IN FOLDER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KANEVSKY, LAURIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENNY'S MOVING & STORAGE CO. INC. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,046.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PHONECALL FROM ATTORNEY IN MASSACHUSETTS - TO PLEASE MAIL A COPY OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO HIM; HIS ADDRESS IS ON FILE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BENNY'S MOVING & STORAGE CO. INC.
LAWYER FOR DEFEND. CALLED SAYING DEFEND. IS IN MASSACHUSETTS, NOT HERE. WILL FEDERAL EXPRESS LETTER TO US; HOPEFULLY WILL GET IT ON 2/23.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,480.00 FILED BY KANEVSKY, LAURIE AS TO DEFENDANT BENNY'S MOVING & STORAGE CO. INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
